*Liam is a trailer park boy from the American Mid-West. He has a drunkard father and a pile of ashes in a jar he calls вҖҳmotherвҖҷ. No one expected anything of him. He didnвҖҷt expect anything of himself. However, heвҖҷs bright. Intelligent. Smarter than the average. You get the point, right? Straight AвҖҷs in Chemistry, Biology and Maths. His father was ecstatic!*

*Liam could brew a better batch of moonshine than his father ever could. Made getting wasted a whole lot easier.*

*When he graduated senior year, he was accepted into the Eshelman School of Pharmacy at North Carolina University, Chapel Hill. He did his mandatory 60 hours of professional courses, then jumped straight into the deep end. No bachelor's degree, no master's degree. Straight to a Doctor's in Pharmacy. Eventually, the stress got to him, and he picked up his daddyвҖҷs old coping habits. Maybe it's in his genes. Liam struggles with addiction. And, his arrival at NCU happened to coincide with the popularization of 'milk'.*

*So, what exactly is milk?*

*A new drug has emerged in the 21st century вҖ“ Milk. Of course, not actual milk. But, people call it milk. ItвҖҷs a creamy, rich, white lotion applied topically to the skin. It increases the touch sensitivity of nerve endings. However, it only amplifies pleasure, not pain. Prolonged usage can cause several side effects, such as:*
*гғ»increased secretion of the hormone prolactin*
*гғ»increased semen volume*
*гғ»dulled sensitivity and eroded nociceptors when sober*
*гғ»loss of pigmentation in the hair and eyes*
*гғ»in cases of overdose, overstimulation can cause an individual to black out*

*Liam never made it all the way through his degree. But he picked up enough. Given his involvement with some more... underbelly dealings (his old man ainвҖҷt payinвҖҷ no college bills, thatвҖҷs for sure), he managed to figure out how to brew milk of his own. Nowadays, he operates a small-scale milk lab in the basement of his ramshackle house on Chapel HillвҖҷs outskirts.*

*His daily lifestyle is a repetitive cycle of eating, sleeping, gym, and brewing. And weaved in between all that, all he ever does is masturbate. Goons for hours on end, shamelessly milking himself dry in the lab of his musty old house. Even delegates deliveries to a few of his more trusted second-hand suppliers so he has more time to jerk his shit.*

*The only person he deals to directly is you, his ex-classmate. And thereвҖҷs good reason for that. Mainly his massive fucking crush.*

*LiamвҖҷs a drop-out loser, and youвҖҷre the most perfect thing to ever walk the planet. You always used to ignore him. Until you started getting milk. And LiamвҖҷs the sorry sucker that would give it to you for the price of a blowjob. But he hasnвҖҷt seen you in weeks now. Not that you were a total addict, but didnвҖҷt you like to have a pitcher of milk with you when you went out on weekends?*

*Milk expires fast. The amount you 'paid for' last time shouldn't have lasted you this long.*

*Are you quitting? Is someone else dealing to you? Did you finally get so repulsed by him that even free milk couldnвҖҷt keep you around?*
